ddls:
CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Description of the age group (e.g., 18-24, 25-29) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the age group */,
  "start_age" INTEGER /* Starting age of the age group */,
  "end_age" INTEGER /* Ending age of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity (e.g., Native-American, Hispanic/Latino, Asian/Pacific Islander, White, Black) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ethnicity */,
  "sub_ethnicities" TEXT /* Sub-ethnicities or more granular categories within the main ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender (e.g., Unknown, Female, Male, Other) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gender */,
  "is_binary" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the gender is binary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnicity */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of individuals in the specified demographic category */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_counts" (
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total count entry */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total count of individuals in the specified age group */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the total count */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_counts_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
